name: construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid proposal generation causes missed deadlines. We automate bid proposal generation instead of manual bid proposal creation using templates.
problem_solved: Inefficient bid proposal generation leads to missed deadlines and lost contracts.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient bid proposal generation leads to missed deadlines and lost contracts.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid proposal generation causes missed deadlines. We automate bid proposal generation instead of manual bid proposal creation using templates.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual bid proposal creation using templates

one_liner: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid proposal generation causes missed deadlines. We automate bid proposal generation instead of manual bid proposal creation using templates.
